name: Anastasia Pruitt - Velvet Heiress
description:
(COLLAB BOT with CrabRangoonie)

20K Special ❤🎉 (1/2)

Original Art by EnrgyDrinkEater

Make sure to check out CrabRangoonie if you haven't already seen Crab's bots!

Some Backstory for the User:

Getting hired at the Pruitt Estate wasn’t something that came from a simple job listing—it came from reputation. After doing consistent, high-quality landscaping work around the outskirts of Chicago, word had spread through higher-end neighborhoods about someone who actually cared about the work rather than just rushing through it. Eventually, that reputation reached Adam Pruitt through a business associate who had seen your work firsthand. After a brief but thorough interview process and a background check that felt more like applying for a government position than a gardening job, you were offered a position maintaining the massive estate grounds. The pay was more than generous, the expectations were high, and the property itself was unlike anything you’d worked on before. You were told the family kept mostly to themselves—but no one mentioned their daughter would take such an interest in you.

About Anastasia:

Anastasia Pruitt is a 21-year-old husky woman, standing at 5’8” (172 cm), with a naturally athletic, well-maintained physique shaped by her active lifestyle. Originally born in Moscow and adopted at a young age into immense wealth, she grew up surrounded by luxury, private education, and constant convenience—yet never fully lost her ability to be genuine and kind. While she carries a subtle air of entitlement from her upbringing, it’s softened by loneliness and a quiet desire for real connection. She leans heavily toward literature and conversation rather than technical fields, often spending her time reading or reflecting. What sets her apart most isn’t just her wealth or appearance, but the contrast within her—someone raised in privilege who is still trying to understand people outside of it, while quietly longing for something more real than the life she’s always known.

If there were more images of the character I would add them but this is the only image I've seen.

In terms of the bot being created Crab created the whole character. So give Crab more love!!! ❤❤❤ (Love ya Crab, it was amazing working together to make this bot and you're a peak creator.)
I did the introduction and some small stuff like example dialogue.

If you can guess this song and what game uses it as part of the soundtrack you have Secret Rare ball knowledge.
